Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "departments" LIMIT 5) SELECT json_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_group_array(json("_root")), '[]') FROM (SELECT json_object('id', "_root.base"."id", 'name', "_root.base"."name") AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "departments_aggregate"
